title: 雪の思い出、ユキノの想い

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah... I'm gett'n a whiff of snow!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Snow? Where, where?! But didn't the weather
people say it'd be sunny?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, that they did, but... I think, start'n right
about now...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whooooa, it is starting to snow! You're AWESOME, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I've been liv'n 'round snow most my life.
You could say I got a sixth sense for it.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'd get home before the snow came down. And
once it settl'd, we'd all go out to shovel.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Then we'd build a massive snow dome and gaze
up at the twinkly stars...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wow! Both the snow 'n' stars are all aglitter!

text_block_list.name: Yukino's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hehe. But my Yuki's the most dazzl'n of 'em all.

text_block_list.name: Yukino's Father
text_block_list.text:
Darn right! Look at 'er stell'r looks. She was born
to be one of them city girls!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Mom... Dad... I hope ev'ryone's doin' okay.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how about this! Let's make a snow dome, you
and me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeaaah! I'm gonna start piling up a ton of
snooow!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: T-Tickezooo! Wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hup, huuup!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Heave, ho! Heave, hoo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! I think that does it! The dome's all done!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! It's a shame we had t'scrimp on the size
'cause of the lack of snow...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh no, here comes a snowstorm!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Eek! Quick, inside!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Phew, looks like the snowstorm let up. Thank
goodness.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming out to see us, night sky!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You were right, Yuki. The stars look soooo pretty!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's a real stunn'r... Both you 'n' the sky are...
incredibly dazzl'n.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(Mom, Dad... This place hardly has much snow,
and you'd be lucky t'catch the stars at night.
Sometimes, I really miss liv'n in Morioka.)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(But y'know what? I have dazzl'n friends all 'round
me who sparkle like the stars!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(So, don't worry about me! Imma keep work'n
hard!)
